name: First United Methodist Church
description: Come play pickleball at First United Methodist Church in Natchitoches, LA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: MLK Recreation Center
description: MLK Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Natchitoches, LA. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms. The court is free.
